page: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dadv6 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs, derived from 2 physical cores with 2 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.7 GHz. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Storage capabilities include a bundled 236 GB local disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable. No GPU hardware is included in this configuration.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores both ranking in the top 25%. Multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core scores, falls within the average range. Text processing is a notable strength, scoring in the top 25% on Geekbench. However, memory bandwidth is a relative bottleneck, with both small-block and large-block read-only tests performing in the bottom 25%. Database operations also show weaker performance, ranking in the bottom 25% on Passmark database tests, while Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput maintain average tiers.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the D4ads_v6 offers a balanced resource profile suitable for standard enterprise workloads that do not require massive memory bandwidth or GPU acceleration. The inclusion of a 236 GB local disk provides built-in storage capacity without requiring separate attachments. Given its strong single-core performance and average multi-core capabilities, this server is well-suited for general-purpose applications, web serving, text processing, and light development environments, though it is less optimal for memory-intensive databases or large-scale LLM inference.
description: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadv6 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores, a 3.7 GHz clock speed, and 16.0 GB of RAM. The instance includes a bundled 236 GB local disk and is Premium Storage capable, with no GPU accelerators. Benchmarks reveal strong single-core CPU and text processing performance, both ranking in the top 25%, while multi-core operations, Redis SET throughput, and static web serving fall into average tiers. Conversely, memory read bandwidth and database operations represent performance tradeoffs, scoring in the bottom 25%. Qualitatively, the server provides a balanced resource-to-cost profile for general-purpose workloads. It is best suited for web serving, text processing, and general application hosting, rather than memory-bound databases or heavy LLM inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB of RAM, and a bundled 236 GB local disk, offering strong single-core performance for standard workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 4 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a 236 GB local disk, optimized for balanced workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, bundled local storage, and strong single-core performance for standard enterprise workloads.

Equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM and a bundled 236 GB local disk.
Delivers strong single-core CPU and text processing benchmark performance.

Best suited for web serving, text processing, and general-purpose applications.
